---
title: "fdr_storey"
generated: true
description: "Storey's pi0-adaptive FDR / q-values (higher power; independence / PRDS)."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.stats.inference.multiple_comparisons`](../nitrix-stats-inference-multiple_comparisons.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:fdr_storey -->
```python
fdr_storey(p_values: Float[Array, 'n'], *, alpha: float = 0.05, lam: float = 0.5) -> Tuple[Bool[Array, 'n'], Float[Array, 'n']]
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:fdr_storey -->
Storey's pi0-adaptive FDR / q-values (higher power; independence / PRDS).

Benjamini-Hochberg with the count `m` replaced by the estimated number of
true nulls `m * pi0` (see :func:`storey_pi0`): uniformly less conservative
than BH when a non-trivial fraction of effects are real, and identical to BH
when `pi0 = 1`.  Returns `(rejected, p_adjusted)`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:fdr_storey -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `p_values` | `Float` | `n` | — | — |
| `alpha` | `float` | — | `0.05` | — |
| `lam` | `float` | — | `0.5` | — |

**Returns** `Tuple[Bool[Array, 'n'], Float[Array, 'n']]`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:fdr_storey -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `n` | query points, each an `ndim`-vector coordinate (variadic) |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
